query: SELECT medicaidId, COUNT(*) as count, GROUP_CONCAT(id ORDER BY createdAt ASC SEPARATOR ',') as ids, GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(firstName,' ',lastName) ORDER BY createdAt ASC SEPARATOR ' | ') as names FROM submissions WHERE medicaidId IS NOT NULL AND medicaidId != '' GROUP BY medicaidId HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 50;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user e1gwTrcxzNkRAvq.27ee13ac78a5 --database aXnNnkD6gAXcPtQ6Yw2PQJ --execute SELECT medicaidId, COUNT(*) as count, GROUP_CONCAT(id ORDER BY createdAt ASC SEPARATOR ',') as ids, GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(firstName,' ',lastName) ORDER BY createdAt ASC SEPARATOR ' | ') as names FROM submissions WHERE medicaidId IS NOT NULL AND medicaidId != '' GROUP BY medicaidId HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 50;
